rag_rules: Preserve AADL architecture by inserting AGREE annex blocks only in valid component or implementation scopes
Place component type contracts in component type annexes and implementation-level bindings in implementation annexes
Use visible identifiers from the current target component or implementation
Avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool for declarations and comparisons
generic_rules: Insert annex blocks in the most specific valid scope
Use visible identifiers to maintain traceability
Avoid implementation details in component type contracts
Align helper declaration types with expression types
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use AGREE logical operators for branching logic
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers
Do not use opaque Boolean data range comparisons
irrelevant_topics: AGREE, annex, assume, guarantee, assign, validator, or repair
